column1: Next steps: what is the experience of students from a care background in education?
Supporting data table
Group variables: Row option, Response
Statistics: Proportion of respondents
Audience: 2022 applicants who shared that they were care-experienced in their UCAS application and were below the age of 25    Domicile: UK
Coverage: All survey respondents who agreed that the care experienced description applied to them
Survey responses are weighted to represent the entire sample population.
Percentages are rounded to the nearest whole number.
Question asked:
As a care-experienced student, how much did the following factors influence your decisions when you were researching your options?
Row option
Financial support for care-experienced students (e.g. bursaries and grants)
Financial support for care-experienced students (e.g. bursaries and grants)
Year-round accommodation (i.e. during holiday periods)
Year-round accommodation (i.e. during holiday periods)
Guaranteed accommodation for the duration of your studies
Guaranteed accommodation for the duration of your studies
A named contact who specifically supports care-experienced students
A named contact who specifically supports care-experienced students
University had been awarded the NNECL Quality Mark
University had been awarded the NNECL Quality Mark
Access to mental health and wellbeing support
Access to mental health and wellbeing support
Guidance through the application process (e.g. help to apply for bursaries or find accommodation)
Guidance through the application process (e.g. help to apply for bursaries or find accommodation)
A mentor or buddy network to help you settle in
A mentor or buddy network to help you settle in
Induction events, activities and visits to help care-experienced people prepare for higher education and get to know the university
Induction events, activities and visits to help care-experienced people prepare for higher education and get to know the university
The opportunity to talk to current care-experienced students
The opportunity to talk to current care-experienced students
